response.justification: Bogdan brings excellent domain knowledge in geospatial data processing (GISCollective) and has a strong background in high-performance distributed systems. However, his recent technical stack leans heavily towards TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his only professional C/C++ experience dating back to 2014-2015 and no Rust experience. He would require ramp-up time for a role that primarily demands modern C++ or Rust.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms.
Experience building high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated systems-level programming capabilities and asynchronous I/O knowledge using DLang.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, the primary required languages.
Most recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript and Node.js rather than operating-system level programming.
No direct mention of building specific navigation guidance or routing tiling pipelines.
